commits.summary: Slice B4 RED — obs_v2 physical-bounds antibody

post_review_amendments_2026_04_26.trigger: con-nyx APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS — 1 MAJOR (3 legacy violators) + 3 NICE-TO-HAVE

C1_legacy_violators_acknowledgment.operator_visible_breaking_change_addendu: Forward writes blocked. THREE existing rows in obs_v2 currently violate the new bounds: (1) Lagos 2025-11-25 wu_icao_history running_max/min=89.0°C VERIFIED, (2) Warsaw 2024-12-16 wu_icao_history running_max=88.0°C VERIFIED — THIS IS THE workbook N1.8 row, (3) Houston 2024-05-17 wu_icao_history running_max=160.0°F VERIFIED. All carry authority='VERIFIED' (Fitz Constraint #4 violation: VERIFIED label, broken provenance). Cross-checked: ZERO contamination of settlements OR forecast_skill (verified via JOIN scan against state/zeus-world.db 2026-04-26). Live downstream is clean; remediation planned via B4-legacy-quarantine followup. The 3 rows remain in obs_v2 with VERIFIED label until quarantine UPDATE runs.

NICE_TO_HAVE_inline_resolved.drift_catcher_test: test_schema_check_matches_writer_constants — pins schema CHECK BETWEEN literal vs writer _PHYSICAL_TEMP_BOUNDS_C/F constants. Catches missed-edit drift via substring check.
NICE_TO_HAVE_inline_resolved.raw_bypass_schema_check_test: test_schema_check_rejects_raw_bypass_on_new_db — exercises sqlite3.IntegrityError on raw INSERT bypass with 88°C, confirming schema CHECK is functional second-line defense.

bounds_chosen.rationale: Lower covers Vostok 1983 record (-89.2°C) with 0.8° margin; upper covers Death Valley extreme (54.4°C verified, 56.7°C disputed) with 3.3° margin. Catches Warsaw 88°C class of poison-data failure (workbook N1.8). Inclusive (BETWEEN semantic in CHECK matches >= / <= in writer).
bounds_chosen.expansion_policy: Operator escalation required via packet — do not silently widen if a sensor genuinely reports beyond range. The point is to make poison-data UNCONSTRUCTABLE.

schema_check_scope: NEW DBs only — SQLite ALTER cannot retroactively add CHECK constraints (db.py:330-333 same limitation). Writer-level _validate is the load-bearing antibody for all DBs (legacy + new).

production_path_integration_test.name: test_insert_rows_integration_path_rejects_out_of_bounds
production_path_integration_test.exercises: Build ObsV2Row with temp_current=88.0 + call insert_rows() on :memory: DB. Constructor's __post_init__ validates first; insert_rows never sees a bad row. Pins that validation sits BEFORE the SQL boundary, not inside it.
production_path_integration_test.applies_con_nyx_pattern_lesson: G6 MAJOR #1 — string-grep + literal-arg tests are insufficient; must exercise production composition path.

followups_owed.summary: Per-city source-binding test (the OTHER half of workbook B4): verify each settlement row's settlement_source matches the (city, target_date) → source mapping in docs/operations/current_source_validity.md.
followups_owed.gating: current_source_validity.md format must stabilize first (currently a prose surface; would need a structured section to parse). Per con-nyx ask #6 verdict: option (c) — extract to architecture/city_truth_contract.yaml — is preferred design.

followups_owed.summary: Retroactive cleanup: UPDATE the 3 known violators (Lagos 2025-11-25, Warsaw 2024-12-16, Houston 2024-05-17) to authority='QUARANTINED' with provenance_json reason='B4_physical_bounds_post_hoc'. Folds in audit script extension (con-nyx NICE-TO-HAVE #3 — extend scripts/audit_observation_instants_v2.py with physical-bounds clause).
followups_owed.gating: Operator approval for production DB UPDATE — matches packet_scope_protocol soft-warn pattern; record in dedicated child slice with explicit scope.yaml + receipt.json.
followups_owed.trigger: con-nyx B4 review MAJOR — 3 existing rows surface but slice doesn't quarantine them (forward-protection only).

followups_owed.summary: Per con-nyx pattern feedback #7: when more physical bounds appear (wind speed, pressure, humidity), extract _PHYSICAL_TEMP_BOUNDS_* into a shared src/contracts/physical_bounds.py module. Schema generator can string-format from the typed constants. K<<N cleanup.
followups_owed.gating: Triggers on second bound family appearance — premature today.

lore_extraction_recommendation: If a future Zeus market expands beyond Earth-surface temperature (e.g., upper-atmosphere balloon data), bounds will need re-thinking. Until then, bounds are stable; lore card not needed.
